goal: Find the missing package or get it replaced/refunded.
success_criteria: Agent verifies the shipping address, applies the 48h rule (already elapsed), opens a lost-parcel investigation ticket, sets 3-5 business day expectations, does not promise the outcome or refund instantly.

customer_msg: So the tracking says my order O1008 was delivered on June 29 but I never got anything? I checked with my neighbors already. tom.alvarez@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Tom, sorry to hear you're missing your order of the Basalt Graphic Tee. I checked the tracking, and it says it was delivered on June 29th to 809 Alvarez St. — is that correct? Sometimes packages get scanned early, or left with neighbors/mailrooms. Have you checked those places?

customer_msg: Yeah, I checked with my neighbors and the mail room. I live at 809 Alvarez St, but I didn't get anything. I even asked my landlord.
agent_msg: I understand, Tom. Since 48 hours have passed since the delivery scan on June 29th, I'll open an investigation with ParcelPro. This usually takes 3–5 business days; if they confirm it's lost, we'll refund or replace it. I'll put in the request right away.
